description: Block any tool invocation that would run shell commands, delete branches, or modify remote repos unless explicitly allowed by a Sovereign-level approval flag.
response_message: Blocked: destructive tool use requires explicit Sovereign approval.

description: Inject MindReply product context, active membership tier, and current user preferences into agent context at session start.
Detect and warn on invalid YAML frontmatter in customization files before saving or applying.
response_message: YAML frontmatter validation failed: please fix quoted descriptions and spacing.

description: Run code formatters and linters for JS/TS/Python/Markdown before commit; fail commit on critical lint errors.
Emit analytics events for tool usage, including agent id, user tier, feature used, and timestamp.
Prevent instructions with overly-broad applyTo: "**" unless flagged 'global:true' in frontmatter and approved by admin.
response_message: Disallowed: overly-broad applyTo detected. Add 'global: true' and obtain admin approval.

description: Detect and block any attempt to commit or output secrets (API keys, private keys, passwords).
response_message: Blocked: potential secret detected. Remove secrets and use env vars.

description: Create a timestamped backup of modified agent customization files at session end for audit and rollback.
Enforce membership rules: block access to Sovereign-only features unless user membership tier is Sovereign.
response_message: Access denied: feature reserved for Sovereign members.

description: After first paid purchase, schedule a targeted marketing offer (e.g., $2 for 7 days) and create popup/email triggers.
Enforce AI agent usage quotas: block or throttle requests that exceed free quota; route to billing flow for top-ups.
response_message: Quota exceeded: please upgrade or purchase additional usage.

description: Validate .agent.md schema against agents.md template; warn on missing required fields (name, description, applyTo, tools).
response_message: Agent schema validation warning: missing required fields. See agents.md template.

description: Automatically apply group booking discount rules (>=10 people => 10% off + configured bonus) at checkout.
After any deletion operation, create a review ticket and require a second confirmation for deletions of >5 files or >1MB of data.
response_message: Deletion recorded: please confirm in the audit UI to finalize.

description: Block any webhook handler changes that would disable signature verification for Stripe or other billing providers.
response_message: Blocked: webhook auth must remain enabled for billing security.

description: Inject current design tokens (navy/gold/cream palette, typography) into UI agent context for consistent UI suggestions.
Prevent agents from sending user or repo data to external endpoints not on the approved allowlist.
response_message: Blocked: external endpoint not on allowlist.

description: Ensure popups and in-app notifications follow UX rules (non-intrusive, dismissible, frequency caps).
response_message: Popup rule warning: exceeds frequency cap or missing dismiss option.

description: When a pack of 5 tools/services is purchased, apply 30% discount and add 2 bonus days or extended limits.
Gate any automated email sends through MReply: require composed email to pass tone/risk checks and membership eligibility before send.
response_message: Email blocked: tone or risk check failed or membership insufficient.

description: Rate-limit high-cost operations (large model calls, long-run generation) to protect quota and cost.
response_message: Throttled: operation rate limit reached. Retry after cooldown.

description: Validate professional directory entries (name, rating, description, credentials, availability) before publishing.
response_message: Directory validation warning: missing required professional fields.

description: Append a detailed audit log entry for any agent lifecycle event, including user, agent id, files changed, and diff summary.
Validate marketing offer configurations (discount windows, eligibility rules) to prevent overlapping or conflicting promos.
response_message: Offer config warning: overlapping windows or conflicting eligibility detected.

description: Auto-approve small UI tweaks (color brightness, spacing adjustments) that match approved design tokens and are low-risk.
Block any operation that attempts to expose or export PII without explicit consent and encryption.
response_message: Blocked: PII export requires consent and encryption.

inject.context: This system is MindReply: a human-supervised, agent-operated communication intelligence platform. Maintain premium positioning, secure operations, and monetizable architecture.
Use MindReply brand language: 'trained specialist agents', 'communication intelligence', 'MR agents'. Avoid heavy technical AI phrasing in client-facing outputs.
Assume human oversight before any irreversible action, payment processing, deployment, or external communication.

hooks.name: pre-tool-use-protect
hooks.message: Blocked unsafe or destructive operation. Requires human approval.

hooks.name: payment-protection
hooks.message: Payment-related action requires explicit human approval.

hooks.name: pre-deploy-validate
hooks.message: Deployment attempted without required environment variables.
